title: TBD Map Object Catalog (validation bundle)
description: N12 — VALIDATION-ONLY bundle of {prefabs, instances, regions, roadSegments}. Production NEVER writes one monolithic catalog file (cost model forbids it): prefabs.json.gz, chunks/*.json.gz, forest-regions.json.gz, roads.json.gz each validate against their own schema. This bundle exists for golden fixtures + CI only.

unassignedTrees.description: Trees not assigned to any forest region (N5 reconciliation overflow bucket).
